name: Brave Search
description: Real-time web search. Tools: search(query).

name: Wikipedia
description: Search and retrieve Wikipedia articles. Tools: search_wikipedia(query), get_article(title).

name: Google Sheets
description: Manage Google Sheets. Tools: read_spreadsheet(id), update_cell(id, range, value).

name: Google Drive
description: Access Google Drive files. Tools: list_files(), download_file(id).

name: Google Calendar
description: Manage calendar events. Tools: list_events(), create_event(data).

name: Microsoft Graph
description: Access M365 (Outlook/Teams/OneDrive). Tools: list_messages(), send_teams_message().

name: AWS S3
description: Manage Amazon S3 buckets. Tools: list_buckets(), upload_object(bucket, key, body).

name: GitHub
description: Automate GitHub tasks. Tools: create_issue(repo, title), list_pull_requests(repo).

name: Postgres
description: Query PostgreSQL databases. Tools: query(sql), list_tables().

name: MySQL
description: Query MySQL/MariaDB databases. Tools: query(sql), describe_table(name).

name: Slack
description: Interact with Slack. Tools: post_message(channel, text), list_channels().

name: Send Mail
description: Sends transactional emails via Resend. Tools: send_email(to, subject, html_body).

name: Fetch
description: Fetches and cleans web content for LLMs. Tools: fetch(url).

name: Filesystem
description: Access local files (restricted to ./data). Tools: read_file(path), write_file(path, content).

name: GLEIF
description: Verified legal entity lookups. Tools: gleif_search(query).

name: Exchange Rates
description: Currency conversion via Frankfurter. Tools: get_exchange_rate(amount, from, to).

name: OpenFIGI
description: Financial instrument lookups. Tools: figi_lookup(ticker).

name: Yahoo Finance
description: Real-time market data, stock prices, and analyst ratings. Tools: get_stock_price(ticker), get_analyst_ratings(ticker).

name: SEC Edgar
description: Official SEC filings database. Tools: search_filings(ticker, form_type), get_latest_10k(ticker).

name: Weather
description: Global weather data and forecasts. Tools: get_forecast(lat, lon).

name: Solar & Wind
description: Specialized forecasts for PV (sun intensity) and wind turbines. Tools: get_solar_yield(lat, lon), get_wind_prognosis(lat, lon).
